runners.formComment: Won two starts back over 300m at Mandurah. Last start he finished last over 300m at Mandurah beaten 5 lengths (17.59) behind Neon Fury in a Free For All on March 19. Draw likely to suit. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.
